allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix deployment: CSP, checkout, webhooks, vendor APIs, 12.5% commission

- Fix CSP to allow Stripe Connect JS \(connect-js.stripe.com\)
- Fix Server Actions allowedOrigins \(strip https:// prefix\)
- Fix checkout price validation to allow discounted items
- Truncate Stripe metadata to stay under 500 char limit
- Add account.updated webhook handler for vendor Stripe status sync
- Fix vendor product creation \(remove non-existent columns\)
- Add vendor routes to CSRF exempt list
- Fix delivery slots API fallback when RPC functions missing
- Fix admin vendors page crash on error response
- Fix rate limiting: use API limits for admin routes
- Fix vendor onboarding status refresh \(GET instead of POST\)
- Update platform commission rate from 15% to 12.5%

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
